workExperience.name: Korea Advanced Institute of Science & Technology (KAIST)
workExperience.description: Focused on early-stage research in PIM-based AI accelerators for optimizing large-scale model inference, particularly for LLMs. Conducted comprehensive paper reviews, comparative analyses, reproduced experimental results, and developed new research proposals to address identified gaps.
